title: Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi
tagline: Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Our Lady of Rosary Church is a Roman Catholic, Kallakurichi, situated in Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Our Lady of Rosary Church is a Roman Catholic, Kallakurichi, situated in Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi has been recognized as a Parish under Diocese of Pondicherry.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Viluppuram Bus Station
topPlaces.description: Viluppuram Bus Station, popularly known as Villupuram New Bus Stand, is one of the bus terminus of Viluppuram, the other being the Viluppuram Old Bus Stand that is primarily used for intra-city buses. The bus station is located 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) away from the town's major railhead Viluppuram Junction.

topPlaces.name: Kallakkurichi division
topPlaces.description: Kallakurichi division is a revenue division in the Kallakurichi district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kallakkurichi block
topPlaces.description: The Kallakurichi block is a revenue block in the Kallakurichi district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 46 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Kallakkurichi taluk
topPlaces.description: Kallakurichi taluk is a taluk of Kallakurichi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kallakurichi.

topPlaces.name: Kallakurichi
topPlaces.description: Kallakurichi is a first-grade municipality and the administrative headquarters of Kallakurichi district in Tamil Nadu, India. The district was formed as the 33rd district of Tamil Nadu by bifurcating Villupuram district on 8 January 2019.

topPlaces.name: 2024 Tamil Nadu alcohol poisoning
topPlaces.description: The 2024 Tamil Nadu alcohol poisoning took place in Kallakurichi district in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu on 20 June 2024. Consumption of illegally made liquor resulted in at least 65 deaths and more than 200 injuries.

topPlaces.name: Somandargudi
topPlaces.description: Somandargudi is a village in Kallakurichi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located on the north bank of the river Gomuki, It is 6 km away from Kallakurichi, in Sankarapuram Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Thachur
topPlaces.description: Thachur is a village in Kallakurichi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is a Grama Panchayat consisting of few villages.

items.note: Viluppuram Bus Station, popularly known as Villupuram New Bus Stand, is one of the bus terminus of Viluppuram, the other being the Viluppuram Old Bus Stand that is primarily used for intra-city buses. The bus station is located 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) away from the town's major railhead Viluppuram Junction.
Kallakurichi division is a revenue division in the Kallakurichi district of Tamil Nadu, India.
The Kallakurichi block is a revenue block in the Kallakurichi district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 46 panchayat villages.
Kallakurichi taluk is a taluk of Kallakurichi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kallakurichi.

Kallakurichi is a first-grade municipality and the administrative headquarters of Kallakurichi district in Tamil Nadu, India. The district was formed as the 33rd district of Tamil Nadu by bifurcating Villupuram district on 8 January 2019.

The 2024 Tamil Nadu alcohol poisoning took place in Kallakurichi district in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu on 20 June 2024. Consumption of illegally made liquor resulted in at least 65 deaths and more than 200 injuries.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (112 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Rosary Church, Kallakurichi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Viluppuram Bus Station, Kallakkurichi division, Kallakkurichi block, Kallakkurichi taluk, Kallakurichi.
